Flexible Live Jazz for Events

From intimate duos to full ensembles, tailored to your event.

Versatile jazz-centered music for weddings, corporate gatherings, private parties, and more — with customizable instrumentation and ensemble sizes to match your setting.

Inquire About Your Event View More Video

What We Do

Versatile jazz, tailored to the room.

We provide live music for weddings, corporate events, private parties, and other gatherings. Our approach is rooted in jazz, with a range that moves from swing and bossa nova to blues, New Orleans grooves, and more modern material.

From intimate duos to larger ensembles, we tailor both the instrumentation and the feel to match your event. Whether you want a light, conversational backdrop or a fuller featured group, we can build the right setup for the occasion.

Book the Band

Looking for an Atlanta jazz band for hire?

Visit our dedicated booking page for full details on lineups, event types, music style, and how to get in touch about your date.

Featured Performances

A closer listen.

In addition to the featured montage above, these full-length clips give a better sense of the sound, feel, and range of the group in a live setting.

Nearness of You

This video was filmed live at La Chiquaida in downtown Decatur, where we perform as a duo every Sunday from 12–2 PM.

Corcovado

This video was filmed live at La Chiquaida in downtown Decatur, where we perform as a duo every Sunday from 12–2 PM.

Flexible Ensembles

Music tailored to your event.

We offer a range of ensemble sizes, from intimate duos to full 8-piece bands, allowing us to match the scale, energy, and budget of your event while staying rooted in a versatile jazz-centered sound.

Package 01

Duo

  • • Guitar + Clarinet
  • • Guitar + Trumpet
  • • Guitar + Vocal

Package 02

Trio

  • • Guitar + Bass + Horn
  • • Guitar + Bass + Vocal
  • • Guitar + Clarinet + Bass

Package 03

Quartet

  • • Vocal + Guitar + Bass + Drums
  • • Guitar + Bass + Drums + Horn
  • • Clarinet + Guitar + Bass + Drums

Package 04

Quintet+

  • • Quintet with Trumpet + Sax
  • • Sextet and larger ensembles
  • • Up to 8-piece band

Custom Instrumentation

Choose a package or build a custom group.

Most clients choose one of the standard ensemble sizes above, but we also offer custom instrumentation based on your event, venue, and musical preferences.

Vocals
Trumpet
Saxophone
Clarinet
Guitar
Piano
Bass
Drums

Contact

Tell us about your event.

Share the date, venue, event type, and any preferred ensemble size or instrumentation, and we’ll get back to you with availability and details.
